channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Steelers and coach Mike Tomlin end season on 5-game skid and make another early playoff exit
item.description: Unable to reverse the negative momentum of a late-season fade, the Pittsburgh Steelers disappeared from the playoffs with a humbling loss to their fiercest rival.
item.dc:creator: David Ginsburg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ezra Ausar scores 21 as Utah earns first Big 12 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a season-high 21 points in just 17 minutes of action. as the Utah basketball team won its first Big 12 Conference game Saturday, beating Oklahoma State, 83-62.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: J.J. Spaun takes the lead at Sony Open with a wide-open chase in the wind of Waialae
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — Stephan Jaeger had nine birdies for the lowest round this week at Waialae, and two of the most important holes for him Saturday in the Sony Open were pars.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Clear skies and clear minds: Rams regroup in Arizona to prepare for playoff game vs. Vikings
item.description: Everything seemed pretty normal for the Los Angeles Rams during practice at their temporary home on a beautiful afternoon in suburban Phoenix.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ohio State favored by 9 1/2 points over Notre Dame, 2nd-largest spread in CFP title game history
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Ohio State ended the regular season with many questions about its program under coach Ryan Day after the Buckeyes were upset by rival Michigan 13-10 on Nov. 30. Now, the Buckeyes not only are in the College Football Playoff national championship game on Jan.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Duke's Cooper Flagg starts fast and finishes with an ACC freshman scoring record
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Cooper Flagg cut across the court to catch an early kickout feed and knocked down a 3-pointer from the wing. Moments later, he was alone in the left corner and confidently had a catch-and-score for another 3. No hesitation.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Deion Sanders has 'very strong interest' in open Raiders job: report
item.description: With his son Shedeur projected to be a top pick in the NFL Draft, Deion Sanders reportedly has "very strong interest" in the Raiders job. And the Raiders need a quarterback.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State hero Jack Sawyer reveals 2-word message former roommate Quinn Ewers gave him after touchdown
item.description: Jack Sawyer and Quinn Ewers were roommates during the Texas quarterback's one year in Columbus, and Ewers had a message for Sawyer, who became a Buckeyes hero.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-NFL player Robert Quinn arrested after attempted hit-and-run in South Carolina
item.description: Former NFL player Robert Quinn was arrested in South Carolina after allegedly attempting to leave the scene of a crash, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State quarterback Will Howard's unusual-looking hand injury sparks concern on social media
item.description: College football fans couldn't look away from the large and gruesome-looking lump that formed on Buckeyes quarterback Will Howard's hand in the first half of Friday's CFP semifinal game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College Football Playoff winners and losers: From the Big Ten and SEC to Notre Dame, Brian Kelly and Chip Kelly
item.description: The Big Ten will collect more than $40 million for its success in the inaugural 12-team College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Lindsey Vonn impresses skiing into 6th place in her first World Cup downhill race since 2019
item.description: ST ANTON, Austria (AP) — Six years later it's “Wow, Lindsey, wow!” The racecourse commentator broadcasting Lindsey Vonn's first World Cup downhill race since 2019 — the American is age 40 and has a titanium knee — summed up how impressive the ski great's performance was.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get ready for the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: When does the Australian Open start? The time in Melbourne
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Here's how much it will cost to (possibly) see Messi play in San Jose
item.description: (KRON) -- Tickets for the San Jose Earthquakes' home match against Inter Miami went on sale Thursday. The match offers a potential chance for Bay Area soccer fans to see Miami and Argentina star Lionel Messi in action.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Lakers game postponed Thursday; coach JJ Redick reportedly loses home in Palisades Fire
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers game against the Charlotte Hornets scheduled for Thursday evening has been postponed as the community reels from the devastating fires throughout the city. The team announced the postponement on X on Thursday, stating that it'll be rescheduled to "focus on what matters most.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Rams could be calling Arizona home for Monday's playoff game
item.description: The National Football League announced a potential change to the Vikings-Rams playoff game scheduled for Monday night at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: White Sox sign former Seattle Mariners infielder
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox signed free agent infielder Josh Rojas Wednesday, according to a press release from the team. The White Sox agreed to terms on a one-year, $3.5-million contract with Rojas. Rojas spent the 2024 season with the Seattle Mariners, hitting .225/.304/.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Thune tees up Tuberville's bill to block transgender athletes from women’s sports
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-S.D.) on Tuesday took the necessary procedural steps to place Sen. Tommy Tuberville’s (R-Ala.) bill blocking transgender athletes from women’s sports on the Senate calendar. The step sets up a vote on Tuberville’s bill in the weeks ahead.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Bears denied permission by Cowboys to interview Mike McCarthy for head coaching job
item.description: CHICAGO — The Bears are casting a wide net in their search for the 18th head coach in franchise history as a critical offseason for the team gets underway. One potential candidate will have to be taken off the interview list — at least for the next several days, if not for good.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU's 14-game home winning streak ends, 72-67
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team has hit a rough patch at the start of Big 12 Conference play. The Cougars made just 5 of 23 three-point attempts in a 72-67 loss at home to Texas Tech Tuesday night. That ended a 14-game winning streak for BYU at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Brayden Point scores with 52 seconds to play to lift Lightning to 3-2 win over Hurricanes
item.description: Brayden Point scored with 52 seconds to play and the Tampa Bay Lightning snapped a four-game skid with a 3-2 victory over the Carolina Hurricanes on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes drop fourth straight to #3 Iowa State, 82-59
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes gave #3 Iowa State a game, but the Cyclones overpowered the Utes down the stretch for an 82-59 victory, handing the Utes their fourth straight defeat. Curtis Jones had 23 points off the bench to lead Iowa State to its 10th straight win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Peter Seidler's brother responds to lawsuit over control of Padres
item.description: Matt Seidler, the brother of late Padres owner Peter Seidler, has responded to the lawsuit filed by Peter Seidler's widow over control of the team.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: LIV Golf fills out its 2025 schedule with final 3 events going head-to-head with PGA Tour
item.description: LIV Golf will play its final three events in the United States the same week as the FedEx Cup playoffs on the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave names Jonas Eidevall as new head coach
item.description: San Diego Wave FC has named Jonas Eidevall as its new head coach. Eidevall, a native of Sweden, has more than a decade of experience as a head coach and has led Arsenal Women to three consecutive top-three finishes in the Women's Super League.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers stars reflect on how season badly derailed
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- As the San Francisco 49ers packed up their lockers at Levi's Stadium on Monday, players told reporters about how they will move forward into next season. Tight end George Kittle summed up the season as "disappointing.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Utah State cracks the top-25 rankings
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a 14-1 start, the Utah State basketball team is back in the top-25. The Aggies check in at No. 25 in both the AP Top 25 and USA Today Coaches Poll. Utah State is 4-0 in Mountain West play, under first-year USU head coach Jerrod Calhoun.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs with Bowles celebrates another division title with dose of caution for playoff rematch
item.description: For the fifth consecutive season, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will enter the NFL postseason, their fourth straight time as champions of the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Bears seek permission to interview Cowboys' Mike McCarthy for head coaching vacancy
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears have sought permission to interview Dallas Cowboys head coach Mike McCarthy and are awaiting a response from the Cowboys, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: North Central football team wins third Division III national title, finishes season a perfect 15-0
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The North Central football dynasty has reached rarified air. So has quarterback Luke Lehnen.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lions secure NFC's No. 1 seed, Broncos and Buccaneers clinch the NFL's final two playoff spots
item.description: The road to the Super Bowl in the NFC will go through Motown. The Detroit Lions secured a No. 1 seed with a 31-9 victory over the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Colts owner Jim Irsay says he's retaining GM Chris Ballard and coach Shane Steichen
item.description: About four hours after the Colts completed their season with a 26-23 overtime victory over the Jacksonville Jaguars, Irsay ended any speculation about possible offseason changes by announcing in a letter to fans that longtime general manager Chris Ballard and second-year coach Shane Steichen would r
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lawsuit alleges Fox Sports ex-host harassed hairstylist and offered her $1.5M for sex
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A woman who worked as a hairstylist for Fox Sports alleges in a lawsuit that former host Skip Bayless made repeated, unwanted advances toward her — including an offer of $1.5 million to have sex with him.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears rally for 24-22 win in Green Bay as Packers lose Love and Watson to injuries
item.description: Caleb Williams drove Chicago to Cairo Santos' 51-yard field goal as time expired and the Bears snapped a 10-game skid with a 24-22 victory over the playoff-bound Green Bay Packers, who lost quarterback Jordan Love and wide receiver Christian Watson to injuries on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5
